title: Rust Traits
description: Rust Traits documents trait material for Rust in the language domain. It is classified as a concept page, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Overview, Define a Trait, Implement a Trait for a Type, Use a Trait in Function Parameters, and Trait Bounds, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include trait, trait bound, impl trait, dyn trait, and rust traits, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / rust / trait, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation.
